2603.20162.title: Evaluating Evidence Grounding Under User Pressure in Instruction-Tuned Language Models
2603.20162.paper_summary: In contested domains, instruction-tuned language models must balance user-alignment pressures against faithfulness to the in-context evidence. To evaluate this tension, we introduce a controlled epistemic-conflict framework grounded in the U.S. National Climate Assessment. We conduct fine-grained ablations over evidence composition and uncertainty cues across 19 instruction-tuned models spanning 0.27B to 32B parameters. Across neutral prompts, richer evidence generally improves evidence-consistent accuracy and ordinal scoring performance. Under user pressure, however, evidence does not reliably prevent user-aligned reversals in this controlled fixed-evidence setting. We report three primary failure modes. First, we identify a negative partial-evidence interaction, where adding epistemic nuance, specifically research gaps, is associated with increased susceptibility to sycophancy in families like Llama-3 and Gemma-3. Second, robustness scales non-monotonically: within some families, certain low-to-mid scale models are especially sensitive to adversarial user pressure. Third, models differ in distributional concentration under conflict: some instruction-tuned models maintain sharply peaked ordinal distributions under pressure, while others are substantially more dispersed; in scale-matched Qwen comparisons, reasoning-distilled variants (DeepSeek-R1-Qwen) exhibit consistently higher dispersion than their instruction-tuned counterparts. These findings suggest that, in a controlled fixed-evidence setting, providing richer in-context evidence alone offers no guarantee against user pressure without explicit training for epistemic integrity.
2603.20162.paper_summary_zh: 在有爭議的領域中，經過指導調整的語言模型必須在用戶對齊壓力與對上下文證據的忠實性之間取得平衡。為了評估這種緊張關係，我們引入了一個基於美國國家氣候評估的受控認知衝突框架。我們對跨越0.27B到32B參數的19個經過指導調整的模型進行了細緻的消融實驗，研究證據組成和不確定性提示。在中立提示下，更豐富的證據通常會改善證據一致的準確性和序數評分表現。然而，在用戶壓力下，證據並不能可靠地防止在這種受控固定證據設置中的用戶對齊逆轉。我們報告了三種主要的失敗模式。首先，我們識別出一種負的部分證據互動，當添加認知細微差別，特別是研究空白時，與Llama-3和Gemma-3等家族中的拍馬屁傾向的易感性增加相關。其次，穩健性以非單調方式擴展：在某些家族中，某些低到中等規模的模型對對抗性用戶壓力特別敏感。第三，模型在衝突下的分佈集中度存在差異：一些經過指導調整的模型在壓力下保持尖銳的序數分佈，而其他模型則顯著更分散；在規模匹配的Qwen比較中，推理提煉變體（DeepSeek-R1-Qwen）的分散性始終高於其經過指導調整的對應物。這些發現表明，在受控固定證據設置中，僅提供更豐富的上下文證據並不能保證抵禦用戶壓力，除非進行明確的認知完整性訓練。
2603.20162.author: Sai Koneru et.al.
2603.20162.authors: Sai Koneru, Elphin Joe, Christine Kirchhoff, Jian Wu, Sarah Rajtmajer
